app_release_notes: v0.16.13 - Workbook help moved to a dedicated Help tab. Cell hover-comments on Excel-for-Mac were clipping at the default popup size regardless of stored size, and the click-to-see input-message workaround still clipped on the longest entries. The new Help sheet at the end of the workbook holds every column meaning, score formula, and choice rationale in plain text — searchable, sortable, no platform-specific clipping. Each main sheet has a small hint pointing there. Also: Seating Depth Log chart titles now say CBTO instead of Jump (was a leftover from the Jump-to-CBTO swap), and the internal column header on Garmin/BallisticX source sheets is now ChargeOrCBTO.
